text:
Mood Clock 心度計 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and as such is required for a player to complete the game. It allows the owner to control their own moods.
__NOTOC__

!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|This clock sets your current state of mind. Turn it to noon and you will maintain perfect serenity. Thus you can adjust your emotions according to the situation.
|

|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)

Summary

Mood Clock 心度計 - This card allows the user to freely change their current mood by changing the hands on the clock. If you turn the hand to 12 O'clock noon, you will maintain a perfect level of serenity.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.020 - 心度計 
あなたの今の精神状態を測ってくれる時計。12時に合わせると平静な精神状態に戻る。TPOにあわせて自身の心をコントロールできる。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.020 - Mood Clock 
A clock that will measure your overall mental state. You return to the undisturbed state of mind when at 12 o'clock. You can control your mind state by TPO
|}
